# Thailand Humanoid Atlas

The Thailand Humanoid Atlas is an open-source, community-driven research database, registry, and analysis platform tracking the humanoid, social, and service robotics ecosystem in Thailand.

## What the Platform Does
- **Robot Registry**: Catalogs humanoid models deployed, tested, or observed in Thailand, detailing specifications, Thailand status, and developer origins.
- **Academic & Software Contributions**: Tracks publications, research papers, datasets, and GitHub repositories authored by Thai developers and institutions.
- **Public & Media Perspectives**: Analyzes public stance and media sentiment on humanoid robots concerning safety, healthcare trust, and employment impact.
- **Physical Inventory**: Logs custody, condition, location, and maintenance of physical humanoid units (e.g. Pepper, NAO, Dinsaw) operated under the project.
- **Interactive Mapping**: Renders AI-clustered geolocation maps of research institutions and detailed relationship connection graphs.

## Target Audience
- Robotics researchers, embodied AI developers, students, makers, policy makers, and educators in Thailand and internationally.

## Key Terminology
- **Humanoid Robotics**: Embodied AI and service robots with human-like features or interactions.
- **Ecosystem Contributions**: Academic research, hardware designs, software repositories, and datasets.
- **Ecosystem Map**: Geographical clustering of robotics developments in Thailand.
- **Relationship Graph**: Topological network mapping connections between institutions, robots, and developers.

## Important Public Pages
- Home (Overview): https://humanoid.or.th/
- Robot Models Registry: https://humanoid.or.th/robots
- Public Perspectives Analysis: https://humanoid.or.th/perspectives
- Contributions Directory: https://humanoid.or.th/contributions
- Ecosystem Map: https://humanoid.or.th/map
- Relationship Graph: https://humanoid.or.th/network
- Analytics Dashboard: https://humanoid.or.th/analytics
- Submit Data: https://humanoid.or.th/submit-data
- Physical Inventory: https://humanoid.or.th/inventory
